welcome.title: Your Heart Map
welcome.subtitle: 10 minutes that change everything
welcome.description:
The better we know you — the more accurate and personal your matches will be.
Your Heart Map is your real profile — not a list of data, but who you actually are.

whyMatters.title: Why does this matter?
whyMatters.point1: The system builds a unique profile from hundreds of parameters
whyMatters.point2: Matches you receive will be tailored to you personally — not just data points
whyMatters.point3: Our matchmakers will know you on a much deeper level

welcome.privacy: Your answers are stored securely and used only for matching purposes

landingPage.title: Your Heart Map
landingPage.subtitle: Get to know you — really
landingPage.description: Our technology analyzes hundreds of unique parameters to understand who you truly are — not just data, but personality, values, dreams and lifestyle. That's how we find a real match.

feature1.title: Who I really am
feature1.description: 8 deep sections that paint your personality

feature2.title: What I'm looking for
feature2.description: Not just data — values, energy and worldview

feature3.title: Precise matching
feature3.description: The system uses your Heart Map to find the best match

identity.title: Identity & Background
identity.subtitle: Who you are and where you come from

family.title: Family & Home Vision
family.subtitle: The home you want to build

completion.title: Your Heart Map is ready!
completion.subtitle: A unique profile that represents who you are
completion.description:
Based on your answers, the system can offer you more accurate and personal matches.
Our matchmakers will know you on a deep level.
completion.tagsTitle: Here's what we discovered about you:
completion.bridgeCta: Want to go deeper? Continue to the full questionnaire

s1_bt_path.life_event: A life event that made me search for meaning

s2_family_atmosphere.quiet_intimate: Quiet and intimate — quality over quantity

s3_character_primary.empathetic: Empathetic — picks up on others' emotions

s3_life_tempo.slow_intentional: Slow and intentional — less but quality
